name: Cold Cucumber Soup- Naing Kuk
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the cucumbers and slice very thinly.
2. Place the cucumber slices in a bowl and add the soy sauce, vinegar, green onions, sugar, chili powder, and sesame oil.
3. Set aside for 1 hour to allow flavors to meld.
4. Toast the sesame seeds in a small pan over medium heat until golden and beginning to pop.
5. Grind the toasted sesame seeds finely.
6. Add the chicken stock to the bowl with the cucumber mixture.
7. Transfer the soup to a serving dish.
8. Sprinkle the ground sesame seeds on top.
9. Serve at room temperature or slightly chilled.
